title: Adding the Account Name from the Accounts Column through auto populate
excerpt: When creating a mass email, I’d like to have the Accounts name in the subject line. Looking at the auto populate fields I’m not seeing that option.

posts.author: FGOMG (Mike Morris)
posts.cookedHtml: When creating a mass email, I’d like to have the Accounts name in the subject line. Looking at the auto populate fields I’m not seeing that option.
